title_en: Alberta's position on the renewed federal child-care agreement
description_en: Reporting covered Alberta's stance on renewing the federal child-care agreement, including the role of for-profit spaces and a period in which the province indicated it would not sign a renewed deal, alongside a mid-point status review.
